docs.text: Get in touch with me Your Email Address Your Name Subject Email body Submit const sampleForm = document.querySelector("#sampleForm"); if(sampleForm) { sampleForm.addEventListener("submit", function(e) { submitForm(e, this); }) } async function submitForm(e, form) { e.preventDefault(); const btnSubmit = document.getElementById("btnSubmit"); btnSubmit.disabled = true; setTimeout(() => btnSubmit.disabled = false, 2000); let jsonBody = {}; console.log(new FormData(form)); for(const pair of new FormData(form)) { jsonBody[pair[0]] = pair[1]; } console.log(jsonBody); const headers = { "Content-Type": "application/json" } fetch("https://prod-02.centralindia.logic.azure.com:443/workflows/e74da9e51f844ad8974af0c160148b84/triggers/manual/paths/invoke?api-version=2016-10-01&sp=%2Ftriggers%2Fmanual%2Frun&sv=1.0&sig=mKhTCIX5ZdD1KRccmQXKrsM-izagdOoKSAuGrFc4rCg",{ method: "POST", headers: headers, body: JSON.stringify(jsonBody) }).then(data => { alert("Email successfuly sent."); }).catch(err => alert(err)) }

docs.text: Your Email Address Your Name Subject Email body Submit const sampleForm = document.querySelector("#sampleForm"); if(sampleForm) { sampleForm.addEventListener("submit", function(e) { submitForm(e, this); }) } async function submitForm(e, form) { e.preventDefault(); const btnSubmit = document.getElementById("btnSubmit"); btnSubmit.disabled = true; setTimeout(() => btnSubmit.disabled = false, 2000); let jsonBody = {}; console.log(new FormData(form)); for(const pair of new FormData(form)) { jsonBody[pair[0]] = pair[1]; } console.log(jsonBody); const headers = { "Content-Type": "application/json" } fetch("https://prod-02.centralindia.logic.azure.com:443/workflows/e74da9e51f844ad8974af0c160148b84/triggers/manual/paths/invoke?api-version=2016-10-01&sp=%2Ftriggers%2Fmanual%2Frun&sv=1.0&sig=mKhTCIX5ZdD1KRccmQXKrsM-izagdOoKSAuGrFc4rCg",{ method: "POST", headers: headers, body: JSON.stringify(jsonBody) }).then(data => { alert("Email successfuly sent."); }).catch(err => alert(err)) }
docs.title: Get in touch with me

docs.text: Resume Certifications Certified Kubernetes Application Developer (CKAD) - ​(Certificate No : LF-5c5zzulb4p) MongoDB Certified Developer Associate (C100DEV) - ​ (Certificate No : 169498401) Work Experience Innovaccer Analytics Software Development Engineer - 2 JANUARY 2020 - Present Wrote a ​custom DSL Query Engine which supports querying over any data store like ElasticSearch, MongoDB, and custom CSVs, abstracting the datastore within, based on various complex pipelines as per business needs. Designed and implemented a Workflow Engine which ​starts individual workflows and tasks​ on each entity, in parallel. Built and worked on multiple microservices using ​Python, Django, Golang and MongoDB​. Built a fully scalable, customizable and ​flexible Workflow Builder to define a ​dynamic CRM system, data flow,​ actions and triggers to be integrated with Contact Center. Dockerizing and enabling CI/CD pipelines for every microservice to make ​it ready for kubernetes environments​ for both Cloud and On-Prem environments. Software Development Engineer - 1 JUNE 2019 - DECEMBER 2019 Helped in writing a ​custom Django Mongo Boilerplate with support for MongoDB ODM (PyMODM) and various middlewares for authentication, authorization, etc. Developed a ​custom internal JSON logging package to be consumed by all applications and microservices, logging in JSON format and integrating ELK stack for analysis. Software Development Intern MAY 2018 - JULY 2018 Helped in breaking down a monolithic application and migration of team’s services to individual integrated microservice architecture​. CloudDive Labs Software Development Intern DECEMBER 2017 - JANUARY 2018 Worked on a cloud based machine learning application with Microsoft Azure. Deployed the same as a web service and consumed in a python application. Internity Foundation Software Development Intern JUNE 2017 - JULY 2017 JAVA development internship for enterprise solutions. Worked on RESTful Backend using JAVA. Got BEST intern certificate. Skills Programming Languages Frameworks and Services Databases and Similar Professional Skills Python Django MongoDB Query Optimization C++ Flask Redis Data modelling and indexing Go Kubernetes ElasticSearch Serverless Computing JAVA MongoDB Atlas and Realm PostgreSQL Cloud Computing JavaScript Docker Data Structures and Algorithms React Celery RESTful API AWS, Azure Education Jaypee Institute of Information Technology Bachelors of Technology (Hons.) - Computer Science (CGPA - 8.9) Awards Got awarded “Leading by Example” for Q3 and Q4, 2019 and Q3, 2020 at Innovaccer. Speaker at MongoDb World Conference (MongoDB.live), 2020, Serverless Computing at Facebook Developer Circles, Delhi and Machine Learning at Shivalik College, Dehradun. Chapter Lead - MongoDB User Community, Delhi NCR. Best Use of MongoDB Mobile - MongoDB World Hackathon, 2019. Research Paper #1886 in IEEE Xplore - IACC Conference.
